languages.text: "Если это называется "контролем ситуации", то я — клерк из {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Администратума{/g}". {n}Соломон бесцеремонно врывается в эфир.{/n} "По тому, что я успел услышать, вмешаться нужно немедленно, Вольный Торговец. И мне очень хотелось бы отправиться туда вместе с вами".

traits.locale_text: "Если это называется "контролем ситуации", то я — клерк из {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Администратума{/g}". {n}Соломон бесцеремонно врывается в эфир.{/n} "По тому, что я успел услышать, вмешаться нужно немедленно, Лорд-капитан. И мне очень хотелось бы отправиться туда вместе с вами".

languages.text: "If this is what you call 'under control,' then I'm a clerk in the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum{/g}," {n}bursts Solomorne's voice unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "I've heard enough to know that intervention is needed immediately, Rogue Trader. And I would very much like to go with you."
languages.original_text: "Если это называется "контролем ситуации", то я — клерк из {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Администратума{/g}". {n}Соломон бесцеремонно врывается в эфир.{/n} "По тому, что я успел услышать, вмешаться нужно немедленно, Вольный Торговец. И мне очень хотелось бы отправиться туда вместе с вами".

traits.locale_text: "If this is what you call 'under control,' then I'm a clerk in the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum{/g}," {n}bursts Solomorne's voice unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "I've heard enough to know that intervention is needed immediately, Lord Captain. And I would very much like to go with you."

"If this is what you call 'under control,' then I'm a clerk in the Administratum," {n}bursts Solomorne's voice unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "I've heard enough to know that intervention is needed immediately, Lord Captain. And I would very much like to go with you."

"If this is what you call 'under control,' then I'm a clerk in the Administratum," {n}bursts Solomorne's voice unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "I've heard enough to know that intervention is needed immediately, Lord Captain. And I would very much like to go with you."

languages.text: 「これが君たちが『コントロール』と呼ぶものなら、私は行政部で事務員だ」{n}ソロモーンはボイスで不躾に声を上げた。{/n}「介入が必要だとすぐにわかるほど、私は十分に聞いた。艦長、私も同行したい」
languages.original_text: "If this is what you call 'under control,' then I'm a clerk in the Administratum," {n}bursts Solomorne's voice unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "I've heard enough to know that intervention is needed immediately, Lord Captain. And I would very much like to go with you."

traits.locale_text: 「これが君たちが『コントロール』と呼ぶものなら、私は行政部で事務員だ」{n}ソロモーンはボイスで不躾に声を上げた。「介入が必要だとすぐにわかるほど、私は十分に聞いた。艦長、私も同行したい」

languages.text: “如果这也叫‘已控制住局面’，那我就是{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}内政部{/g}里的文书了。”{n}索罗蒙的声音毫不客气地从音阵中响起。{/n}“行商浪人，很明显，现在需要您的立刻介入，而我非常希望能随您同行。”
languages.original_text: "If this is what you call 'under control,' then I'm a clerk in the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum{/g}," {n}bursts Solomorne's voice unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "I've heard enough to know that intervention is needed immediately, Rogue Trader. And I would very much like to go with you."

traits.locale_text: “如果这也叫‘已控制住局面’，那我就是{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}内政部{/g}里的文书了。”{n}索罗蒙的声音毫不客气地从音阵中响起。{/n}“行商浪人，很明显，现在需要您的立刻介入，而我非常希望能随您同行。”

languages.text: «Si esto está "bajo control", yo soy un funcionario del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum{/g}». {n}La voz de Solomorne restalla bruscamente por el voco.{/n} «He oído lo suficiente como para saber que es necesario intervenir de inmediato, Comerciante Independiente. Me gustaría mucho ir con usted».
languages.original_text: "If this is what you call 'under control,' then I'm a clerk in the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum{/g}," {n}bursts Solomorne's voice unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "I've heard enough to know that intervention is needed immediately, Rogue Trader. And I would very much like to go with you."

traits.locale_text: «Si esto está "bajo control", yo soy un funcionario del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum{/g}». {n}La voz de Solomorne restalla bruscamente por el voco.{/n} «He oído lo suficiente como para saber que es necesario intervenir de inmediato, Comerciante Independiente. Me gustaría mucho ir con usted».

languages.text: "Wenn Ihr das 'unter Kontrolle' nennt, bin ich ein Beamter des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratums{/g}", {n}ertönt Solomornes Stimme ungezwungen aus dem Vox.{/n} "Ich habe genug gehört, um zu wissen, was umgehend erforderlich ist, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Und ich würde Euch sehr gerne begleiten."
languages.original_text: "If this is what you call 'under control,' then I'm a clerk in the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum{/g}," {n}bursts Solomorne's voice unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "I've heard enough to know that intervention is needed immediately, Rogue Trader. And I would very much like to go with you."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn Ihr das 'unter Kontrolle' nennt, bin ich ein Beamter des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratums{/g}", {n}ertönt Solomornes Stimme ungezwungen aus dem Vox.{/n} "Ich habe genug gehört, um zu wissen, was umgehend erforderlich ist, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Und ich würde Euch sehr gerne begleiten."

languages.text: {n}La voix de Solomorne se fait soudain entendre par le vox :{/n} « Si c'est ce que vous appelez "avoir la situation en main", je suis un greffier de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum{/g}. J'en ai assez entendu pour savoir qu'une intervention est requise sur-le-champ, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, et j'aimerais beaucoup vous accompagner. »
languages.original_text: "If this is what you call 'under control,' then I'm a clerk in the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum{/g}," {n}bursts Solomorne's voice unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "I've heard enough to know that intervention is needed immediately, Rogue Trader. And I would very much like to go with you."

traits.locale_text: {n}La voix de Solomorne se fait soudain entendre par le vox :{/n} « Si c'est ce que vous appelez "avoir la situation en main", je suis un greffier de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum{/g}. J'en ai assez entendu pour savoir qu'une intervention est requise sur-le-champ, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, et j'aimerais beaucoup vous accompagner. »

languages.text: "Eğer 'kontrol altında' dediğin buysa ben de {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum'da{/g} kâtibim." {n}Solomorne'un sesi, vokstan beklenmedik şekilde duyuluyor.{/n} "Acilen müdahale edilmesi gerektiğini bilecek kadar şey duydum Hür Tacir. Sizinle gelmeyi çok isterim."
languages.original_text: "If this is what you call 'under control,' then I'm a clerk in the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum{/g}," {n}bursts Solomorne's voice unceremoniously over the vox.{/n} "I've heard enough to know that intervention is needed immediately, Rogue Trader. And I would very much like to go with you."

traits.locale_text: "Eğer 'kontrol altında' dediğin buysa ben de {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAdministratumGlossary}Administratum'da{/g} kâtibim." {n}Solomorne'un sesi, vokstan beklenmedik şekilde duyuluyor.{/n} "Acilen müdahale edilmesi gerektiğini bilecek kadar şey duydum Hür Tacir. Sizinle gelmeyi çok isterim."
